title: Lumpy skin disease in Europe
body: "Preliminary and updated outbreak assessments for lumpy skin disease in Europe.  We monitor any major, notifiable or new and emerging animal disease outbreaks worldwide. When we become aware of a new animal disease outbreak in the UK or another country, we may carry out a preliminary outbreak assessment.  Read our lumpy skin disease guidance for information about how to spot the disease, what to do if you suspect it and measures to prevent it. "
